title: Login Authentication Error
description: User cannot log in even with correct email and password credentials.

title: Payment Deducted but Order Not Confirmed
description: Customer's payment was deducted from bank account but no order confirmation was received.

title: Website Loading Extremely Slow
description: Homepage takes more than 15 seconds to load on mobile devices.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: User requested password reset but did not receive any email.

title: Profile Image Upload Failed
description: User unable to upload profile image due to server error.

title: Cart Items Disappearing
description: Products added to cart are removed automatically after page refresh.

title: Invoice Download Not Working
description: Customer unable to download invoice PDF after purchase.

title: Search Function Returning No Results
description: Search bar returns empty results even for existing products.

title: App Crashing on Checkout
description: Mobile application crashes when proceeding to checkout page.

title: Wrong Order Delivered
description: Customer received a different item instead of the ordered product.

title: Notification Not Showing
description: Users are not receiving push notifications after updates.

title: Discount Code Not Applying
description: Promo code entered during checkout is not applying any discount.

title: Account Suspended Without Reason
description: Customer account was suspended without prior notification.

title: Language Switch Not Working
description: Website language toggle does not change content properly.

title: Order Tracking Not Updating
description: Tracking page not updating shipment status in real-time.
